zh.lifeSummary: 當John Berney於1362年出生在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆時，他的父親Sir Thomas Berney26歲，母親Margaret de Reedham22歲。他於1381年與Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年9月5日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆享年78歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Berney于1362年出生在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Berney26岁，母亲Margaret de Reedham22岁。他于1381年与Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年9月5日在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆享年78岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Berney was born in 1362, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Berney, was 26 and his mother, Margaret de Reedham, was 22. He married Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham in 1381, in Reedham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 5 September 1440, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Reedham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Berney est né en 1362, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Berney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Reedham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham en 1381, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1440, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Berney 1362 in Reedham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Berney 26 und seine Mutter Margaret de Reedham 22. Er hat 1381 in Reedham, Norfolk, England Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1440 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Reedham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Berney è nato il nel 1362 nel Reedham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Berney, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Reedham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham nel 1381, nel Reedham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 settembre 1440, nel Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Reedham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Berneyが1362年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Berneyは26歳，母Margaret de Reedhamは22歳であった。1381年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムでIsabel Elizabeth Heveninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年9月5日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで78歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクレエドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Berney(이)가 1362년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Berney(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Reedham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 리드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Berney nasceu em 1362, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Berney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Reedham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham em 1381, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1440, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Berney родился в 1362 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Berney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Reedham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham в 1381 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 сентября 1440 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Berney nació en 1362, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Berney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret de Reedham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham en 1381, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1440, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
